decision.rationale: Architecture plan complete: 8 tasks decomposed, 12 decisions documented, all 20 FRs traced, 17 ACs verifiable. Tasks 04-08 completed. Approach A (Direct Retrofit) selected.

outputs.description: Full architecture plan: problem, 3 approaches, Approach A selected, detailed contracts for all modified files, 12 decisions, 8 tasks, requirements coverage matrix, risk register, verification plan
Self-contained implementer brief: role, allowlist, createlist, denylist, task execution order, verification plan
Task 01: Add container_for() helper to Morales Snakefile
Task 02: Update config.yaml — containers block, downstream_scripts_dir, remove tools section

next_stage_context: The implementer reads implementer-prompt.md first, then executes tasks 01-05 sequentially (each depends on the previous), then tasks 06-08 in parallel (no dependencies). AC verification commands are embedded in each task file. End-of-pipeline verification: `snakemake --lint` and dry-run.
